body.title: CLOSED: activate() spreading activation primitive
body.result: activate.py with cosine match, temporal decay, visited-set propagation; 7 tests pass
body.description:
New function `activate(memory_id, stimulus_embedding, *, conn=None, **kwargs)` in `wild_igor/igor/cognition/activate.py`. Steps in order:
1. Fetch node from clan.memories; read watch_condition embedding (stored in metadata.watch_embedding as float list); cosine similarity vs stimulus_embedding; skip if below per-node threshold (metadata.activation_threshold, default kwargs.get('threshold', 0.65)).
2. Activation decay: current_score = node.activation_score (new column); decay_factor = 0.7 ** (days_since(node.last_activated_at) if last_activated_at else 0.0); new_score = max(current_score * decay_factor, 0.0) + (similarity * kwargs.get('signal_weight', 1.0)).
3. UPDATE clan.memories SET activation_score=new_score, last_activated_at=now() WHERE id=memory_id.
4. Propagate: visited = {memory_id}; for each neighbor (parent_id + metadata.associations entries [{memory_id, weight, relation}]): skip if in visited or depth >= max_depth or prop_score < min_score; prop_score = new_score * propagation_decay * neighbor.weight; recurse with depth+1, visited|{neighbor.memory_id}.
5. After propagation, call focus_state.update_from_activation(top_node_id, top_score) — from T-igor-focus-state.
All DB writes direct psycopg2.

Defaults (all overridable via kwargs): propagation_decay=0.7, max_depth=3, min_score=0.05, threshold=0.65, signal_weight=1.0

DB migration: ADD COLUMN activation_score float DEFAULT 0.0, ADD COLUMN last_activated_at timestamptz (both nullable-safe, backward compatible).

**Affected files:** `wild_igor/igor/cognition/activate.py` (new), DB migration (activation_score + last_activated_at on clan.memories)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; direct psycopg2; no cortex.py touch; visited-set (set of int memory_ids per call) prevents association cycles; max depth hard cap 3; min score cutoff 0.05; all defaults overridable via kwargs; clan.memories schema change adds nullable columns only (backward safe)
**Scope boundary:** IN — activate(), decay, propagation, focus_state.update_from_activation() call. OUT — no focus_state schema (T-igor-focus-state), no embedding generation (caller passes stimulus_embedding), no NE wiring (future ticket).
**Test plan:** activate() on seeded node with matching embedding raises activation_score; decay applied correctly on node with stale last_activated_at; propagation reaches parent node but stops at depth 3; visited-set prevents infinite loop in association ring (A→B→A); focus_state.update_from_activation() called with highest-scored node id; node with similarity below threshold not updated
